subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for reaching out. We would be happy to explore working together.

I can offer 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Let me know which slot works best and I will confirm it.

I’m not able to share internal contact directories or direct internal contact details.

Best,
[Your Name]
